metadata.name: bosch-alarm-mode2
metadata.summary: An async Python library for interacting with Bosch Alarm Panels supporting the 'Mode 2' API.

classes.name: bosch_alarm_mode2.panel.Panel

methods.name: bosch_alarm_mode2.panel.Panel._output_status_consumer
documentation: Solution panels send events with output ids that don't match those
used by the rest of the commands. This means we can't actually rely
on the data from the subscription event and instead need to poll for output status
Connection to a Bosch Alarm Panel using the "Mode 2" API.
